votes.rationale: Motion-0035 successfully established the first formal context substrate for dev-jai-nexus. The project constitution, repo capsule schema, motion packet schema, slot policy, and scoring rubric now exist as governed substrate artifacts for future context bundles, councils, and slot orchestration.

The motion remained appropriately scoped. It formalized durable local substrate artifacts without drifting into retrieval systems, provider staffing, or cross-repo federation. The five artifacts are distinct, compact, and aligned with current dev-jai-nexus workflow.

The implementation is coherent and strategically useful. The substrate artifacts define stable constitutional and schema-level expectations that future generated context bundles and council reasoning can rely on, raising the structural floor of JAI NEXUS.
